title: Curaleaf Reports Third Quarter 2024 Results
text: Curaleaf Holdings reported Q3 2024 financial results with net revenue of $330.5 million, down 1% year-over-year. The company maintained an adjusted gross margin of 49%, up 312 basis points compared to the prior year period. CEO Boris Jordan stated: Third quarter revenue was $331 million, down 1% and adjusted gross margin of 49% was up 312 basis points compared to last year. Key metrics include: Adjusted EBITDA of $75.3 million with a 23% margin, Net loss from continuing operations of $44 million, Operating cash flow (9 months) of $118.6 million, Free cash flow (9 months) of $53 million, and Cash position of $90 million at quarter end. International revenue surged 82% year-over-year to $30 million, driven by expansion in the German market and other European operations. The company opened retail locations in New York, Ohio, and Florida while launching new product lines. Post-quarter, Curaleaf secured a $40 million revolving credit facility at 7.99% interest and expanded to 151 U.S. retail stores. The company maintains 742.5 million weighted average shares outstanding.
